product: Genie chart fixes and feature enhancements
tagline: Fixed thin bars on binned date charts: Resolved an issue where very thin bars appeared in bar charts with binned dates.
what_it_does: Fixed thin bars on binned date charts: Resolved an issue where very thin bars appeared in bar charts with binned dates. Fixed single point maps: Point maps now render correctly even when only a single point is present. Increased entity matching limit: Spaces can now include up to 120 entity matching (previously value dictionary) columns.
why_it_matters: Improved accuracy for percentage questions: Genie now returns more accurate results for percentage type queries, such as conversion rates, with correct rounding to two digits.
plain_summary: Fixed thin bars on binned date charts: Resolved an issue where very thin bars appeared in bar charts with binned dates. Fixed single point maps: Point maps now render correctly even when only a single point is present.

capabilities.desc: Partner-Powered AI features must be enabled. See Partner-powered AI features.

capabilities.title: PDF uploads are not supported
capabilities.desc: PDF uploads are not supported in compliance security profile workspaces. At least CAN RUN permissions on the Genie Agent. See…

key_takeaway: Fixed thin bars on binned date charts: Resolved an issue where very thin bars appeared in bar charts with binned dates.
